text: Bush, brush, brush. Blush your teeth in the morning night. Brush, brush, brush. Blash, brush, brush. Brush your teeth in the morning night. Blash, brush, brush. Blush, brush, brush. Brush your teeth in the morning night. Bash, brush, brush. Blush, brush, fast. Blush your teeth in the morning night. Blash, brush, bush. Blash, brush, brush. Bush your teeth in the morning night. Blash, brush, brush. Bush, brush, brush.
